name: Potato and Apple Pudding (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter into the hot mashed potatoes, add a good pinch of salt, and the flour.
2. Mix well, then add enough milk to make a soft, slack dough.
3. Roll out and line a 1-quart bowl with some of the dough, reserving enough for the lid.
4. Fill the bowl with peeled and cored apples, finely sliced, and sweeten to taste with sugar.
5. Add 2 whole cloves, the lemon juice, and the cider (or water), taking care not to make it too wet.
6. Dampen the pastry edges, lay the lid on and press down.
7. Cover with foil and secure well.
8. Steam or cook set in boiling water up to the rim for 2 - 2 1/2 hours.
9. Serve cut in wedges with cream or homemade custard.
